### Files created in `packages/pixelart/`:

| **`src/pixelart-image-model.ts`** | `PixelArtImageModel` class implementing `ImageModelV3` — the `doGenerate` method sends POST to `/images/generations` with model, prompt, n, size, seed, style, and pixel_density. Returns base64 images. Emits `unsupported` warnings for aspectRatio, files, and mask |
| **`src/pixelart-image-settings.ts`** | `PixelArtImageModelId` type (with `pixelart-standard`, `pixelart-hd`, `pixelart-sprite` presets + extensible string) and `PixelArtImageSettings` interface with `size`, `style` (`"pixel" | "retro" | "8bit"`), and `pixelDensity` |
